create.description: Create a key for API access. The full key is shown only once.

created.description: This is the only time you will be able to view this key. Please copy and store it securely now. Once this window is closed, you will not be able to see it again.
created.title: API Key Created
created.warning: Attention: This key will only be shown once!

description: Create and manage API keys for this workspace.

name.too_long: API key name is too long

rename.description: Update the display name for this API key.
rename.title: Rename API Key

delete.description: Delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

title: API Keys
